indicators.name: large dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large for a single person to comfortably use as a workspace.

indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: The seating arrangement is designed for multiple people, making it unsuitable for solo work.

indicators.name: lack of dedicated workspace
indicators.rationale: There is no dedicated workspace for a single person to set up a computer.

indicators.name: open kitchen layout
indicators.rationale: The open kitchen layout allows for distractions and noise from cooking activities.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large dining table and lack of dedicated workspace make it difficult to set up a comfortable and efficient workstation. The open kitchen layout also introduces potential distractions and noise, further reducing the suitability for focused solo work.
